name: Synonyms in Context
description: Choose the nearest meaning of a word as used in a sentence.

name: Antonyms
description: Identify the word opposite in meaning to the given word.

name: Word Roots and Families
description: Build vocabulary through roots, prefixes, suffixes and related forms.

name: Subject-Verb Agreement
description: Match singular and plural subjects with correct verb forms.

name: Sentence Correction
description: Fix grammar, structure, clarity and usage errors.

name: Main Idea
description: Find the central claim or purpose of a passage.

name: Inference
description: Draw a valid conclusion from evidence in the text.

name: Tone and Purpose
description: Identify attitude, audience, intention and rhetorical function.

name: Context Clues
description: Use surrounding words to infer the missing word.

name: Double Blank Completion
description: Solve two-blank sentence completions using logic and vocabulary.

name: Percentages
description: Percentage increase, decrease, comparison and exam shortcuts.

name: Ratios and Proportions
description: Compare quantities and solve proportion-based questions.

name: Averages
description: Mean, weighted average and combined average problems.

name: Algebra Basics
description: Equations, simplification, inequalities and algebraic translation.

name: Functions
description: Evaluate and interpret functions in test-style problems.

name: Arrangements
description: Order people, objects or events under given conditions.

name: Grouping Logic
description: Form valid groups while satisfying restrictions.

name: Conditional Reasoning
description: Use if-then rules, contrapositive logic and chained conditions.

name: Assumptions
description: Identify the unstated idea required by an argument.

name: Strengthen and Weaken
description: Choose evidence that supports or attacks an argument.

name: Logical Fallacies
description: Recognize flawed reasoning patterns in arguments.

name: Tables and Charts
description: Interpret numerical information from tables, bar charts and line graphs.

name: Trend Analysis
description: Compare changes, rates and patterns across data sets.

name: Number Series
description: Identify arithmetic, geometric and alternating number patterns.

name: Figure Patterns
description: Solve non-verbal pattern, rotation and analogy questions.

name: Essay Structure
description: Plan introduction, thesis, body paragraphs, evidence and conclusion.

name: Summary Writing
description: Condense a passage without losing its central meaning.

name: Cell Biology
description: Cell structure, organelles and biological functions.

name: Enzymes
description: Enzyme action, factors and biological importance.

name: Genetics
description: Genes, inheritance, DNA and variation.

name: Atomic Structure
description: Subatomic particles, isotopes and electron arrangement.

name: Chemical Bonding
description: Ionic, covalent and metallic bonding concepts.

name: Kinematics
description: Motion, velocity, acceleration and equations of motion.

name: Electricity
description: Current, voltage, resistance, circuits and power.

name: Programming Logic
description: Algorithms, conditions, loops and basic problem solving.

name: Computer Fundamentals
description: Hardware, software, memory, networks and digital literacy.

name: Pakistan Studies
description: Important national facts, history, constitution and institutions.

name: Everyday Science
description: Scientific ideas commonly tested in general knowledge sections.
